The '''''Corrupter'' Task Force''' was an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[Task force/Legends|task force]] that had been placed under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Garreth Holtz]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The unit was named for Holtz's command ship, the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|'' Corrupter'']].

==History==
While the ''Corrupter'' itself participated in the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], having been one of the ships damaged by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[V-150 Planet Defender/Legends|ion cannon]], the location of her task force at this point in time was unknown. However, it was possible that the task force was only assembled after the battle, when Holtz was presumably given his orders to hunt down and eliminate any surviving Rebels still hiding within the [[Anoat sector/Legends|Anoat sector]].

The task force discovered the presence of the Rebel [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Defiance/Legends|''Defiance'']] and hunted it relentlessly. Its flagship, however, was somehow badly damaged, putting it out of action long enough for the Alliance forces to escape into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. As punishment, Holtz was assigned to patrol duty in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]; it was likely that the ''Corrupter'' Task Force went with him on this campaign.

==Corrupter Task Force order of battle==
*[[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|'' Corrupter'']]
*[[Neutron Star-class bulk cruiser/Legends|''Neutron Star''-class bulk cruiser]] [[Cerebus (bulk cruiser)|''Cerebus'']]
*[[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] ''[[Vigiliance]]''
*[[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Badlands (CR90 corvette)|'' Badlands'']]
*[[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Malice (CR90 corvette)|''Malice'']]
*[[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvette]] [[Kraken (Assassin-class)|''Kraken'']]
*[[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] [[Monitor (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Monitor'']] (possibly, though could also be simply a support ship)

The ''Corrupter'' also commanded the following groups of [[Viper probe droid/Legends|Viper probe droids]]:
*[[Oracle (Viper)|''Oracle'']]
*''[[Diviner]]''
*[[Seer (Viper)|''Seer'']]
